GEN_START_FAILURE.title: Generator cold-start failure (bridge)
steps: Confirm utility tie is stable and customer load is within bridge nameplate.
Pull last 24h unit telemetry; check fuel pressure, battery, and fault codes.
If repeat failure: swap to redundant unit or escalate to CAT field service.
Notify customer ops contact within 30 minutes; log SLA clock.

GRID_INTERCONNECTION_DELAY.title: Grid interconnection delay
steps: Validate remaining bridge capacity vs contracted MW.
Update customer forecast and GFA monthly demand signal.
Review extension clauses in bridge-to-permanent exhibit.
Escalate if delay threatens permanent energization milestone.

FUEL_INFRA_MISMATCH.title: Fuel infrastructure mismatch (hybrid microgrid)
steps: Compare actual vs modeled gas consumption for rolling 72h window.
Inspect LNG skid capacity and vaporizer duty cycle.
Tune hybrid dispatch setpoints before adding generation.
Document variance for monthly consumption settlement.

PHASED_RAMP_BEHIND.title: Phased load ramp behind schedule
steps: Reconcile customer load profile vs approved ramp chart.
Confirm available MW and redundancy for next phase step.
Schedule joint call with customer engineering within 1 business day.
Do not advance phase without signed change notice.
